name: Pan-Broiled Teriyaki Salmon -- Lowfat
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Mirin (sweet rice wine, available in oriental markets)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil, mirin, and soy sauce in a 10-inch saute pan over medium heat.
2. Add the salmon fillets to the pan and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Carefully turn the fish over with a spatula and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the salmon is pink on the outside and barely pink inside.
4. Garnish with chopped scallions and serve on heated plates.
YIELD: Serves 4
Each serving: 162 calories, 23 grams protein, 5.4 grams total fat, 2 grams carbs, 59 milligrams cholesterol, 0.1 gram fiber, 393 milligrams sodium, 59 milligrams calcium
